svg.title: KOSMOS Agent Swarm Coordination — moving scenario
svg.desc: Coordinator-centric 4-phase workflow for address change: Research, Synthesis, Implementation, Verification with 3 ministry workers

g.text: ④ Verification — 각 트랜잭션 성공 확인
file-based, Redis Streams 확장 가능 · permission_request / permission_response

svg.text: ★ 권한은 Coordinator를 통해서만 이동, Worker 간 직접 전달 불가
